Package reciprocal.number.fraction

Class Fraction

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Number
reciprocal.number.fraction.AbstractFraction<Long,Fraction,Double>
reciprocal.number.fraction.Fraction
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Comparable<Fraction>
@API(status=EXPERIMENTAL, since="0.0.1") public final class Fraction extends AbstractFraction<Long,Fraction,Double>

Immutable implementation of a fraction which uses Long as type for its numerator and denominator

The returned Fractions of most methods are neither normalized nor reduced.

See Also:
